source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 庆祝中国共产党成立105周年大会侧记
topics.official_english: Side Notes on the Celebration of the 105th Anniversary of the Founding of the Communist Party of China
topics.why_hot: Major political anniversary event, widely covered and discussed.
topics.share_angle: Explain the significance of the 105th anniversary and key messages from the celebration.

topics.chinese_topic: 佛得角再次感谢中国：帮我们圆梦
topics.official_english: Cape Verde Thanks China Again: Helping Us Realize Our Dream
topics.why_hot: International cooperation story with emotional resonance.
topics.share_angle: Highlight China's role in helping Cape Verde achieve a dream, possibly related to sports or infrastructure.

topics.chinese_topic: 日本首次公布跟踪中国航母视频

topics.why_hot: Military and geopolitical tension, rare footage release.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the implications of Japan's tracking and the state of China-Japan relations.

topics.chinese_topic: 中小学生暑期安全提示请收好
topics.official_english: Summer Safety Tips for Primary and Secondary School Students
topics.why_hot: Public service announcement with high relevance to families.
topics.share_angle: Summarize key safety tips and why they are important during summer break.

topics.chinese_topic: 到底是谁取消了有线耳机
topics.official_english: Who Really Canceled the Wired Earphone?
topics.why_hot: Tech trend debate, consumer frustration with missing headphone jacks.
topics.share_angle: Trace the history of the headphone jack removal and discuss consumer choice.

topics.chinese_topic: 普京首次承认俄罗斯缺油
topics.official_english: Putin Acknowledges Russia's Oil Shortage for the First Time
topics.why_hot: Major geopolitical and economic news from a top oil producer.
topics.share_angle: Explain the context and potential global impact of Russia's oil shortage.

topics.chinese_topic: 宁夏辟谣“硒砂瓜滞销烂市”

topics.chinese_topic: 多省献血量还在降 血站寻找下一袋血
